sentences.arabic: النِّيَّةُ شَرْطٌ أَسَاسِيٌّ لِصِحَّةِ الْعِبَادَاتِ فِي الْإِسْلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Nijjet je osnovni uvjet za ispravnost ibadeta u islamu.
sentences.translationEn: Intention is a fundamental condition for the validity of acts of worship in Islam.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الْوَحْيِ، حَدِيثٌ رَقْمُ 1].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: «Djela se cijene prema nijjetima» [Bilježi Buharija u Knjizi o početku objave, hadis br. 1].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet, peace be upon him, said: 'Actions are judged by intentions' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Beginning of Revelation, hadith no. 1].

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ اللَّهَ يَنْظُرُ إِلَى قَصْدِ الْإِنْسَانِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَنْظُرَ إِلَى عَمَلِهِ الظَّاهِرِ.
sentences.translation: To znači da Allah gleda na namjeru čovjeka prije nego što gleda na njegovo vanjsko djelo.
sentences.translationEn: This means that Allah looks at a person's purpose before looking at their outward deed.

sentences.arabic: فَمَنْ صَلَّى أَوْ صَامَ أَوْ تَصَدَّقَ رِيَاءً فَلَا أَجْرَ لَهُ.
sentences.translation: Ko klanja, posti ili daje sadaku zbog prikazivanja, nema nagrade.
sentences.translationEn: Whoever prays, fasts, or gives charity out of show receives no reward.

sentences.arabic: وَالدَّرْسُ الْعَمَلِيُّ أَنَّ الْمُسْلِمَ يُجَدِّدُ نِيَّتَهُ لِلَّهِ فِي كُلِّ عَمَلٍ يَقُومُ بِهِ.
sentences.translation: Praktična pouka je da musliman obnavlja svoju nijjet isključivo radi Allaha u svakom poslu koji obavlja.
sentences.translationEn: The practical lesson is that a Muslim renews their intention solely for Allah in every action they undertake.
